# 'gs repo init --recurse-submodules' initializes git-spice in
# each submodule and sets spice.submodule.recurse=true.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2026-03-11T15:00:00Z'

# Sub repo (no gs init).
cd sub-repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'

# Parent repo with submodule added but no init yet.
cd $WORK/repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'
git -c protocol.file.allow=always submodule add $WORK/sub-repo libs/core
git commit -m 'Add submodule'

# Initialize parent with recurse-submodules.
gs repo init --trunk=main --recurse-submodules

# Both repos should be initialized.
git -C libs/core rev-parse --verify refs/spice/data
git rev-parse --verify refs/spice/data

# The local config should be set.
git config --local spice.submodule.recurse
stdout 'true'

-- sub-repo/feat.txt --
sub feature
-- repo/.keep --
